title: 大模型终于不卷跑分，改卷打工了！
content: In early April 2024, China released several trillion‑parameter AI models, notably DeepSeek V4 and Kimi K2.6. DeepSeek focused on low‑cost inference, pricing a token half the cost of GPT‑5.5, enabling long‑context agents. Kimi emphasized agent ecosystems, offering 300‑agent clusters that can deliver complex outputs in minutes versus traditional teams hours. Both models shared open‑source innovations (DeepSeek’s MLA attention, Kimi’s Muon optimizer), accelerating adoption on Chinese hardware and marking a shift from single‑model AI to collaborative AI teams.

title: 关于视觉调教方面，国内安卓怎么和苹果差距这么多
content: The author walks through several Chinese Android flagship phones and finds their visual design far inferior to iOS. Apps like Toutiao, Douyin, and Weibo exhibit harsh contrast, glaring white fonts, uneven font sizes, and jarring layout. Images and videos look overly sharp and AI‑style, lacking iOS’s smooth, translucent presentation. Even after disabling image enhancement and changing system fonts, the problems persist. Only Samsung approaches iOS aesthetic quality, prompting the author to ask whether international Android brands share Apple’s design sensibility.

title: 做了一个 RAG 流，产品文档 AI 客服工具，昨天刚上线在内测，分享一下，希望大佬们提点意见🙏
content: The author has released a public beta of an AI‑powered customer‑support widget built with Next.js, MongoDB, and Qdrant. Users upload documents; the system generates an embeddable chatbot that answers based on those documents and includes source references for each reply. The project follows a standard vector‑RAG workflow using a remote LLM and is now in a month‑old beta phase, with free usage currently available. Feedback and testing are welcomed through the site https://kodda.dev.

title: 中国正式出台针对在线平台零工的劳动法规
content: China has enacted specific labor regulations for gig workers employed through online platforms, establishing formal rules that address employment status, wages, benefits, and safety. The legislation is aimed at providing clearer protections for digital‑economy workers and ensuring compliance by platforms with existing labor standards.

title: 随着“TikTok一代”为实体店带来热潮，英国商业街重现生机
content: UK high streets are experiencing a revival, driven by the TikTok generation’s enthusiasm for physical stores. The social‑media trend has spurred increased foot traffic, revitalizing local businesses and restoring the vibrancy that had declined in many town centres. The renewed in‑store buzz demonstrates a shift back toward experiential retail amid changing consumer habits.

title: 让印度的数字再次发挥作用
content: The Economist article discusses efforts to strengthen India’s statistical systems so that its economic and demographic data become reliable and useful for decision‑making. It outlines current challenges—limited data quality, fragmented sources, and slow implementation of modern techniques—and describes reforms being pushed by government agencies, international partners, and private firms. The goal is to ensure that India’s numbers accurately reflect progress and guide policy and investment in the country’s rapidly evolving economy.

title: Tip: Web requests should not be measured in Hz [Hertz]
content: Web requests are better evaluated by metrics such as latency, throughput, or requests per second rather than in hertz, which is suited to periodic signals. Using hertz can misrepresent traffic patterns, avoid confusing performance monitoring, and focus on realistic user‑experience indicators.

title: APL is more French than English
content: The piece discusses the APL programming language, arguing that its conventions, symbols, and terminology are more closely aligned with French linguistic patterns than with English. It examines historical influences, naming choices, and syntax decisions, concluding that APL’s design reflects a distinctly French heritage rather than an Anglo‑American one.

title: 一名持枪歹徒闯入唐纳德·特朗普与媒体共进的晚宴
content: A gunman burst into an event where former President Donald Trump was dining with journalists. The intrusion occurred at Trump’s dinner with the press, creating an immediate security concern. The incident was reported by the *Economist* and highlighted the vulnerability of public gatherings involving high‑profile figures. The situation raised alarms about safety protocols for such events.

title: Codex agentic loop 会导致代码严重膨胀，有人遇到吗？有没有系统性的解法？
content: The article discusses how an “agentic loop” causes severe code bloat, illustrated by a 530‑line V2EX Safe Reading Helper Greasemonkey script. It highlights repeated fallback logic, dual re‑fill mechanisms, legacy migration code that always runs, redundant storage checks, and an overly cautious pagination watchdog. The author asks whether systemic solutions exist or if this bloat is an inherent flaw of current agentic coding practices.

title: ADHD不是缺陷，而是优势？剑桥大学心理学顶刊这样说 | 原文
content: The article discusses how ADHD may be viewed as a strength rather than a defect. It questions the prevailing emphasis on monitoring and correcting attention differences, noting that while a diagnosis can relieve parents from blaming their child, it also leads to interventions that imply the brain must be “fixed.” The piece reflects on the need to reconsider how society perceives ADHD and whether the current focus on repair is appropriate.

title: 贾跃亭，到账230亿
content: Jia Yueting’s Faraday Future (FF) has secured a $45 million U.S. investment, bringing total funding to about $32 billion ($230 billion RMB). The deal followed the U.S. SEC’s four‑year probe ending without charges, alleviating regulatory concerns and allowing institutional investors to reengage. FF, founded in 2014, struggled from early hype to production delays but now pivots to a dual strategy: continued luxury EVs and a new MPV brand, alongside a profitable EAI robot line. The luxury EV market is expanding rapidly, offering new opportunities for innovative entrants.

title: AI 编程实战： Claude Code + IDEA 的沉浸式编程方案
content: Claude Code is Anthropic’s AI coding assistant that reads entire projects, understands context, and follows custom rules via Skills. It can be installed on macOS with Homebrew, configured with an API key and base URL, and launched from a terminal or via a JetBrains plugin. Commands include /init, /status, /model, /clear, /plan, /compact, and /config. Best practices advise clearing context, planning before executing, defining project rules in CLAUDE.md, using Hooks for automation, and validating changes with tests.

title: 美国白宫记者晚宴枪击事件调查细节公布，枪手被控两项罪名，27 日将出庭受审，哪些信息值得关注？
content: White‑House Press Club dinner on April 25, 2024 saw a security breach when an armed assailant tried to breach a checkpoint outside the Hilton Washington. The attacker, later identified as a Californian man, was tackled by Secret Service agents; he fired once, but the lone agent hit, later recovering at a hospital. The suspect is charged with use of a firearm in violent crime and assaulting federal officers and will appear in federal court on April 27, with additional charges expected. Trump highlighted the incident to stress new security upgrades at the White‑House banquet hall.

title: 每天 800 美金 token 搓了几个小产品
content: He used an $800 daily budget to develop three small projects: 1) a private crypto and US‑stock tool combining portfolio, copy‑trading, and API, purely for personal use. 2) a Chinese‑stock quantitative lab powered by an AI Copilot that integrates delayed data, custom strategy testing, risk checks, real‑world friction modeling, and strict compliance rules to provide a realistic performance score. 3) a Web3 smart‑contract audit platform that runs automated scans, generates repair patches using multiple AI models, and delivers complete PR‑ready audit reports with full automation.

title: 谷歌寄望于人工智能边缘计算，以追赶云计算领域的竞争对手亚马逊和微软
content: Google is focusing on artificial‑intelligence edge computing to compete with Amazon and Microsoft in the cloud market. By advancing AI capabilities at the network edge, Google aims to reduce latency and improve performance, positioning itself as a stronger contender against its major cloud rivals.

The war has caused shortages and logistical challenges, impacting the region’s confectionery market and potentially raising costs and availability of pistachio‑based products.

title: ai 编码业务功能验收的正确流程
content: The article outlines a proper workflow for accepting AI‑generated coding tasks. After automated code passes linting, type checks, and unit tests, real‑world business functionality must still be verified. It recommends using a structured requirement document with EARS‑based acceptance criteria and a detailed task template that references those criteria. The template includes implementation steps, unit and end‑to‑end test requirements, and alignment with UI/UX, engineering, and design standards to ensure that delivered features truly meet business needs.

title: 还得是 Claude
content: I had never been a fan of Claude, using its Pro tier for a month while also subscribing to GPT‑Plus and GLM‑Pro. After the costly CC plan, I relied mainly on domestic GLM‑5.1, which worked fine for most linear development. Recently, I faced a bug on an iOS camera app’s beautification feature. Despite extensive research and GLM‑5.1’s best efforts, it couldn’t fully resolve the issue. When I finally tried Opus‑4.7, it instantly fixed the problem, highlighting a significant performance gap in this tough scenario.

content: 近期，有短视频发布者称，把一种叫作“铼”的金属粉末掺进黄金里进行高温烧熔，冷却后不仅黄金重量增加，而且无论是肉眼还是机器都发现不了端倪，掺铼的黄金纯度高达99.9%，这是真的吗？有消费者和黄金回收商家反馈买到了掺铼的“假黄金”，如何分辨黄金是否掺铼？ 去年…

title: 800亿买卫星，贝索斯杠上马斯克
content: Amazon, led by Jeff Bezos, is buying Globalstar for $11.57 billion (≈¥800 billion) to add L‑ and S‑band licenses and satellites to its Amazon Leo space‑internet project, directly challenging Elon Musk’s Starlink. Globalstar, a veteran satellite‑communications company, now owns 24 operational satellites and key frequency rights. The acquisition gives Amazon regulatory standing, enhances infrastructure, and delays Starlink dominance. It marks a strategic move in the growing commercial‑satellite race, intensifying competition between Bezos and Musk.

title: “700台机器没日没夜打”，有年轻人靠它“月赚10万”
content: Three Chinese 3D‑print operators show varying income: a Jiangsu entrepreneur sells handmade items at markets for a few hundred to a thousand yuan per day; a Singapore‑based hobbyist spends over Rp 1 million on equipment and materials and currently breaks even; a Shanghai “farm‑owner” runs 700 printers, producing toys and parts for export, earning roughly ¥100 000 monthly. Profits depend on scale, material costs, and the ability to design unique products amid rising competition. The industry is expanding, but long‑term success favors those integrating design, materials, and a global supply chain.

content: The article describes how the newly launched Chinese Super League (Sú Chāo) has quickly become a cultural event, especially in the city of Suqian. Despite the league’s short start, residents of Suqian celebrated a win in both sports and local pride, highlighting how such events provide a new holiday and communal experience that goes beyond ordinary urban competition and consumption.

title: 西方科学教育为何走向衰落？综合课程改革动摇了根基 | 原文
content: Western science education has declined because reforms of the 1980s onward failed to reverse a long‑standing crisis. Despite heavy investment, U.S. and other Western countries now lag behind East‑Asian systems in mathematics and science. Large‑scale assessments such as PISA and TIMSS consistently show these gaps, indicating that the comprehensive curriculum changes have undermined foundational performance.

title: OpenAI Privacy Filter
content: OpenAI has introduced a privacy filter designed to mitigate the risk of leaking personal data. The filter automatically removes or masks sensitive content before it is displayed to users, improving compliance with data protection standards. It aims to reduce accidental exposure of personally identifiable information or questionable content. The system performs automated screening and is updated as new privacy concerns arise. It is intended to protect users while maintaining the utility of OpenAI's services.

title: Agents Aren't Coworkers, Embed Them in Your Software
content: Agents are not traditional coworkers; they should be embedded directly into your software’s architecture. This approach treats AI agents as integrated components that interact with data, APIs, and user workflows, enabling more efficient, context‑aware functionality without relying on external workspaces or separate teams.

title: 特斯拉客服回应「FSD 将于 5 月 1 日在中国上线」：不实，以官方发布为准
content: Tesla customer service stated that a social‑media screenshot claiming Tesla Vice President Tao Lin announced FSD would launch in China on May 1 is false. No such announcement has been made, and Tesla will only release official news. The screenshot said the FSD driver‑assist system would be live at midnight on May 1, offering a three‑month trial and a subsequent subscription of 699 ¥ per month. Tesla’s Q1 2026 revenue was $22.4 billion (≈¥153.4 billion), up 16 %. The company has recently obtained approval in the Netherlands and aims to launch the system in China soon.

title: 东方甄选主播明明和天权将离职，俞敏洪：挽留但尊重选择
content: On April 24, East Selection announced that hosts Mingming and Tianquan would leave the company. Founder Yu Minhong tried to retain them but respected their decision and stated the firm understood their career plans. Both had faced prior controversies—Mingming apologized after a comment about Guizhou’s landscape, and Tianquan was suspended for a phone‑dropping stunt. Host Linlin also confirmed her departure.

title: 不爱“茅台”，年轻人需要的是属于自己的“老村长”
content: The article explains the rise of “scattered wine shops” (打酒铺子) as a new way for young people to drink Chinese liquor. These informal, on‑street venues replace high‑end banquet halls with casual, low‑price, single‑cup service, offering a relaxed, community‑based experience that cuts out traditional power dynamics and branding. The trend reflects the liquor industry’s need to adapt to oversupply, changing consumer preferences, and a shift toward experiential, cost‑effective sales models, while also highlighting trust and profitability challenges.

title: 36氪首发 | 全球唯二、中国唯一造出微米级磁悬浮魔毯，已大规模量产
content: Fengshan ZengGong Intelligent Technology Ltd., founded in 2018, is the only Chinese company and second globally to master a six‑degree‑of‑freedom magnetic‑levitation (mag‑lev) transport system. After five years of R&D, it released a mag‑lev “magic mat” that lets components hover with micrometer precision and accelerate up to 2 G. Unlike rigid belt lines, the system moves components independently, enabling concurrent assembly tasks and “autonomous driving” of each carrier. Core strengths include microsecond‑synchronised communication, encoder‑free magnetic定位, and in‑house multiphysics simulation. The company plans to scale the technology to heavier loads such as batteries and further enhance speed, load, and precision.

title: A股“疯狂扫货”，120亿芯片大佬欲跨界“抄底”？
content: Chip magnate Jiang Xueming, worth 12 billion yuan, has recently intensified his presence in the A‑share market. He acquired 10 % of snack‑maker Lai Yifen for 3.84 billion yuan and invested 750 million yuan in the restructuring of cut‑blade maker Zhang Xiaoquan. While Lai Yifen faces repeated losses, Zhang Xiaoquan’s profits grew sharply last year. Jiang, known for turning distressed assets, appears to be expanding into consumer goods amid ongoing losses at his core semiconductor company, Dongxin Co.

content: A gunman fired at the White House Correspondents' Dinner held at the Washington Hilton on April 25, 2024. The shooter was later found dead. President Donald Trump was urgently evacuated from the venue amid the incident. No other casualties or injuries were reported. The event concluded after the shooting.

DeepSeek cut DeepSeek‑V4‑Pro API prices by 75% for ten days, introduced a 1M‑context naming rule, and updated tools to newer versions. A DeepSeek employee shared role‑play prompts for switching the model’s thinking style via special instructions. Qwen released Qwen‑Image‑2.0‑Pro, improving image quality and text rendering, now ranked ninth in global text‑to‑image benchmarks. Meituan opened invite testing for its trillion‑parameter LongCat‑2.0‑Preview. Cursor 3.2 added parallel multitasking, OpenClaw 2026.4.24 improved voice and browser automation with DeepSeek V4 support, and Baidu Netdisk added AI agent file‑management skills. Grok Imagine upgraded video‑generation for better lip‑sync and audio. Google Cloud’s CEO announced plans for a new Gemini model.

title: 特朗普对霍尔木兹海峡的封锁加剧了这场历史性的航运危机
content: Trump’s blockade of the Strait of Hormuz has intensified an already historic shipping crisis. By restricting passage through the critical waterway, the U.S. has escalated tensions and disrupted global maritime trade flows that heavily depend on the route for oil and goods. The move has triggered international concerns over shipping security, energy supply stability, and the broader economic impact of constrained maritime traffic.

title: 各位推荐一个 32G Macbook air M5 可以跑的 moe 模型

title: 伊朗最高领袖已明确下令，霍尔木兹海峡不得恢复战前状态，会是永久战略吗？对国际市场意味着什么？
content: Iran’s Supreme Leader, Ayatollah Ali Reza Khamenei, has ordered that the Strait of Hormoz cannot return to its pre‑war operating conditions. The decision, highlighted by Vice‑Chairman Nikzad of the Islamic Parliament, signals a permanent shift in the strait’s status. This move could affect regional security dynamics and alter maritime logistics for international oil transport.

title: 2026 04 26 HackerNews
content: The article covers a range of Hacker News topics: a low‑cost RTL8159‑based 10 GbE USB adapter that works well on USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 PCs, Firefox’s experimental integration of Brave’s Rust ad‑blocking engine, a paper proposing a “learning mechanics” framework for deep‑learning theory, evidence that a quantum‑ECLDP claim was actually random noise, security concerns about the Rodecaster Duo’s open firmware, the enduring value of plain‑text tools, a review of classic American diners, OpenAI’s new GPT‑5.5/Pro models, an AI‑driven wiki project, a Wayland compositor with blur, and commentary on AI layoffs, quantum‑era hype, and OpenAI/Google investment headlines.

You began buying Marshmello stock 18 months ago and monitor its stores and vending machines in malls, airports, and train stations. These locations remain popular. However, over the last two months you noticed a shift: a new product line (labubu) is now available, whereas it was unavailable six months ago. Conversations with other labubu enthusiasts, who have spent significant money but are not obsessive collectors, reveal that the product’s lack of scarcity has made it less desirable. You seek an explanation for the drop in product hype.

title: Framework Laptop 13 Pro: Major Upgrades and Linux Front and Center
content: The Framework Laptop 13 Pro has been upgraded with significant hardware improvements, positioning it as a compelling choice for users who prioritize customization and Linux compatibility. Enhanced components and an expanded port selection make the device more versatile, while its build‑on‑demand design ensures that Linux users have a reliable, developer-friendly platform without sacrificing portability.

title: 低价私募信贷基金吸引抄底者
content: Cheap private credit funds are attracting bargain hunters seeking to acquire distressed or undervalued debt, causing a surge in low‑price offerings. These funds target non‑bank lenders seeking to diversify, while investors cut costs by using lower yields as a discount. The trend reflects broader market shifts toward more aggressive debt auctions and a growing appetite for high‑risk, high‑reward credit strategies.

title: 内幕交易案件可能引发预测市场的清算
content: Insider trading investigations may trigger a bankruptcy for prediction‑market platforms. Reports suggest that legal scrutiny and potential regulatory actions highlight vulnerabilities in these markets, potentially leading to restructuring or liquidation as businesses face liabilities from insider activity. The outcome could reshape how prediction markets operate and be regulated.

title: 中国外交部长王毅与缅甸方面商讨重启边境贸易事宜

title: 败选的奥尔班表示不会就任，希望领导改革
content: Defeated Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orbán has announced he will not take the parliamentary seat he lost. He said he intends to focus on leading political renewal rather than accepting the position.

title: 给 NginxPulse 扩展了一个服务器状态卡片
content: 新服务器装好后，我发现我挺在意机箱里的硬件温度以及风扇转速信息的，于是花了点时间在NginxPulse上扩展了下。

title: 英伟达适配 DeepSeek-V4 AI 模型，开箱性能超 150 tokens/sec/user
content: NVIDIA’s Blackwell platform now supports DeepSeek‑V4‑Pro and DeepSeek‑V4‑Flash models. Pro has 1.6 T parameters (49 B active) for advanced inference; Flash offers 284 B parameters (13 B active) for high‑speed use. Both handle 1 M‑token contexts and 384 k‑token outputs under MIT licensing. On a GB200 NVL72 card, Pro achieves over 150 tokens/second per user and can be deployed quickly on Blackwell B300, with further performance gains expected. Developers can download via NVIDIA NIM or use SGLang and vLLM for custom inference.
source: Readhub - 每日早报 - 金融界

title: 华为 AI 眼镜开售 自研 AI 芯片＋12 小时续航 2499 元起
content: Huawei launched its first AI glasses on April 25, priced from ¥2,499. The lightweight 35.5 g device features 6.25 mm thin arms, HDR Vivid support, AI flash capture, composition correction, and call‑noise reduction. It runs on HarmonyOS, offers 12‑hour battery life, magnetic fast charging, and multiple color/optical‑lens options. The glasses incorporate Huawei’s own AI chip and can be used with the Huawei AI Glasses app.
source: Readhub - 每日早报 - 手机中国

title: 特朗普取消赴美参加伊朗谈判的行程，停火协议前景未卜
content: Former U.S. President Donald Trump canceled his planned trip to the United States to attend negotiations on Iran, leaving the future of a ceasefire agreement uncertain.
